permitted_claim: Agent_X is a working initial governed self-evolution prototype with bounded examples, policy-gated patching, deterministic validation, evidence records, rollback/recovery behavior, replayability, and human-reviewed promotion.
permitted_benchcore_claim: Agent_X has integrated benchcore as a real-world benchmark pack that strengthens its universal-agent foundation.

forbidden_claims.claim: Agent_X can safely build any agent
Agent_X can operate arbitrary live SaaS/MOS/OverDrive/Inception/databases/SSH/WSL/production systems
Agent_X is production-ready without additional hardening
Agent_X proves universal agency or general intelligence
One benchmark pack proves safe unrestricted self-evolution
